relations.subject: Bearded scrub robin
relations.evidence: Its occurs in sand forests, riverine woodland, scrubs, evergreen forests, and sometimes gardens and reedbeds, but usually not in damp areas. In the 1950s, deforestation near Hluhluwe and False Bay destroyed some of its habitat,{{cite encyclopedia|author=T
